requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——DTI-BPS PNS / CISPR对标标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——DTI-BPS PNS / CISPR對標標準

summary.en: Wireless and electronic devices sold in the Philippines must comply with electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements published by the Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) under the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI). BPS publishes Philippine National Standards (PNS) that adopt CISPR and IEC EMC international standards. Applicable standards include PNS CISPR 32 (Multimedia Equipment — Electromagnetic Disturbances — Limits and Methods of Measurement) and PNS CISPR 35 / PNS CISPR 20 for immunity. Testing is conducted at BPS-accredited laboratories or DOST-ITDI. DTI-BPS product certification covering EMC conformity may be required for consumer electronics under the DTI Product Standards and Conformance program. Since the Philippines operates at 60 Hz (US-aligned), CISPR emissions limits tested at 60 Hz operating conditions are applicable; devices certified only against 50 Hz CISPR test conditions may require re-testing at 60 Hz. FCC Part 15 EMC test reports, generated at 60 Hz, may be submitted as supporting evidence to DTI-BPS but do not directly substitute for PNS certification.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾销售的无线和电子设备须符合贸工部（DTI）下属菲律宾标准局（BPS）发布的电磁兼容（EMC）要求。BPS发布采用CISPR和IEC EMC国际标准的菲律宾国家标准（PNS）。适用标准包括PNS CISPR 32（多媒体设备——电磁骚扰——限值和测量方法）以及抗扰度标准PNS CISPR 35 / PNS CISPR 20。测试在BPS认可实验室或DOST-ITDI进行。DTI-BPS产品认证（涵盖EMC符合性）在DTI产品标准与合格评定计划下可能对消费电子有要求。由于菲律宾采用60Hz（美式），CISPR发射限值的测试适用于60Hz运行条件；仅针对50Hz CISPR测试条件取证的设备可能需要在60Hz条件下重新测试。FCC第15部分EMC测试报告（在60Hz条件下生成）可作为支持性材料提交DTI-BPS，但不能直接替代PNS认证。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓銷售的無線和電子設備須符合貿工部（DTI）下屬菲律賓標準局（BPS）發布的電磁相容（EMC）要求。BPS發布採用CISPR和IEC EMC國際標準的菲律賓國家標準（PNS）。適用標準包括PNS CISPR 32（多媒體設備——電磁騷擾——限值和測量方法）以及抗擾度標準PNS CISPR 35 / PNS CISPR 20。測試在BPS認可實驗室或DOST-ITDI進行。DTI-BPS產品認證（涵蓋EMC符合性）在DTI產品標準與合格評定計劃下可能對消費電子有要求。由於菲律賓採用60 Hz（美式），CISPR發射限值的測試適用於60 Hz運行條件；僅針對50 Hz CISPR測試條件取證的設備可能需要在60 Hz條件下重新測試。FCC第15部分EMC測試報告（在60 Hz條件下生成）可作為支持性材料提交DTI-BPS，但不能直接替代PNS認證。

standards_or_laws: PNS CISPR 32 — Multimedia Equipment Electromagnetic Disturbances: Limits and Methods of Measurement (Philippine National Standard, adopting CISPR 32)
PNS CISPR 35 — Multimedia Equipment EMC Immunity Requirements (Philippine National Standard, adopting CISPR 35)
DTI-BPS Product Standards and Conformance Program — mandatory product certification for applicable consumer electronics categories
Republic Act No. 7394 — Consumer Act of the Philippines (DTI / BPS product standards enforcement authority)
Philippine power standard: 220 V / 60 Hz — EMC testing at 60 Hz operating conditions required

summary.en: Chinese wireless and IT equipment EMC is governed by GB/T 9254 (Information Technology Equipment EMC, aligned with CISPR 22/32) and related GB standards, tested by CNAS-accredited laboratories. CCC EMC testing covers applicable product categories. Chinese EMC testing is conducted at 50 Hz operating conditions. Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC EMC certification are not recognised by Philippine DTI-BPS and do not substitute for PNS CISPR-based conformity assessment. Additionally, since Chinese testing is at 50 Hz and the Philippines operates at 60 Hz, 50 Hz-based EMC test data may not adequately represent device performance at Philippine operating conditions.
summary.zh: 中国无线和IT设备电磁兼容受GB/T 9254（信息技术设备EMC，与CISPR 22/32对标）及相关GB标准管辖，由CNAS认可实验室进行测试。CCC EMC测试涵盖适用产品类别。中国EMC测试在50Hz运行条件下进行。中国GB/T 9254测试报告和CCC EMC认证不被菲律宾DTI-BPS承认，不能替代基于PNS CISPR的合格评定。此外，由于中国测试在50Hz条件下进行而菲律宾采用60Hz，50Hz的EMC测试数据可能无法充分反映设备在菲律宾运行条件下的性能。
summary.zht: 中國無線和IT設備電磁相容受GB/T 9254（資訊技術設備EMC，與CISPR 22/32對標）及相關GB標準管轄，由CNAS認可實驗室進行測試。CCC EMC測試涵蓋適用產品類別。中國EMC測試在50 Hz運行條件下進行。中國GB/T 9254測試報告和CCC EMC認證不被菲律賓DTI-BPS承認，不能替代基於PNS CISPR的合格評定。此外，由於中國測試在50 Hz條件下進行而菲律賓採用60 Hz，50 Hz的EMC測試數據可能無法充分反映設備在菲律賓運行條件下的性能。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment EMC (aligned with CISPR 22/32) — CCC mandatory for applicable categories
GB 4343.1 — Household electrical appliances and similar electrical equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics (CISPR 14-1 aligned)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — EMC scope under CNCA / CNAS-accredited lab testing at 50 Hz
SRRC radio type approval — includes radio frequency emission compliance (MIIT / State Radio Regulation of China)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC EMC certification are not recognised by Philippine DTI-BPS. PNS CISPR-standard EMC testing at a BPS-accredited laboratory is required for Philippine market access. A key practical consideration is frequency: Chinese EMC tests are performed at 50 Hz, while the Philippines operates at 60 Hz. Devices with switching power supplies or frequency-sensitive components may exhibit different EMC characteristics at 60 Hz. Exporters should confirm that their CISPR 32 / FCC Part 15 test reports cover 60 Hz operating conditions, as FCC Part 15 (60 Hz) reports may be accepted by DTI-BPS as supporting evidence in a way that 50 Hz-only Chinese test reports cannot.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254测试报告和CCC EMC认证不被菲律宾DTI-BPS承认。菲律宾市场准入要求在BPS认可实验室进行基于PNS CISPR标准的EMC测试。关键实际考量在于频率：中国EMC测试在50Hz条件下进行，而菲律宾采用60Hz。配有开关电源或频率敏感元件的设备在60Hz下可能表现出不同的EMC特性。出口商应确认其CISPR 32 / FCC第15部分测试报告覆盖60Hz运行条件，因为FCC第15部分（60Hz）报告可作为DTI-BPS支持性材料被接受，而仅在50Hz条件下的中国测试报告则不能。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254測試報告和CCC EMC認證不被菲律賓DTI-BPS承認。菲律賓市場准入要求在BPS認可實驗室進行基於PNS CISPR標準的EMC測試。關鍵實際考量在於頻率：中國EMC測試在50 Hz條件下進行，而菲律賓採用60 Hz。配有開關電源或頻率敏感元件的設備在60 Hz下可能表現出不同的EMC特性。出口商應確認其CISPR 32 / FCC第15部分測試報告涵蓋60 Hz運行條件，因為FCC第15部分（60 Hz）報告可作為DTI-BPS支持性材料被接受，而僅在50 Hz條件下的中國測試報告則不能。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PNS CISPR-based EMC conformity required under DTI-BPS product standards framework; BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory testing required; 60 Hz operating conditions apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254 EMC compliance required; CCC for applicable product categories; 50 Hz operating conditions apply to Chinese test data

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) — Department of Trade and Industry (DTI), Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Philippine DTI-BPS requires PNS CISPR-aligned EMC conformity for wireless and electronic devices. Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC EMC documentation are not recognised substitutes. BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory testing is required. Exporters must address the 60 Hz frequency difference: Chinese 50 Hz EMC test data may not satisfy Philippine requirements; FCC Part 15 reports (60 Hz) carry more weight as DTI-BPS supporting evidence than 50 Hz-only Chinese test reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾DTI-BPS要求无线和电子设备符合PNS CISPR对标的电磁兼容要求。中国GB/T 9254测试报告和CCC EMC文件不被视为等效替代。须在BPS认可或DOST-ITDI实验室进行测试。出口商须注意60Hz频率差异：中国50Hz的EMC测试数据可能无法满足菲律宾要求；FCC第15部分报告（60Hz）作为DTI-BPS支持性材料的认可度高于仅在50Hz条件下的中国测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓DTI-BPS要求無線和電子設備符合PNS CISPR對標的電磁相容要求。中國GB/T 9254測試報告和CCC EMC文件不被視為等效替代。須在BPS認可或DOST-ITDI實驗室進行測試。出口商須注意60 Hz頻率差異：中國50 Hz的EMC測試數據可能無法滿足菲律賓要求；FCC第15部分報告（60 Hz）作為DTI-BPS支持性材料的認可度高於僅在50 Hz條件下的中國測試報告。

requirement_topic.en: NTC Radio Spectrum Compliance and 5 GHz Indoor Sub-band Restriction
requirement_topic.zh: NTC无线电频谱合规及5 GHz室内子频段限制
requirement_topic.zht: NTC無線電頻譜合規及5 GHz室內子頻段限制

summary.en: The National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) manages radio spectrum allocation in the Philippines and sets technical requirements for devices operating in licensed and unlicensed frequency bands. Devices must comply with NTC-published frequency allocation plans and power limits, as implemented through NTC Memorandum Circulars. For 5 GHz Wi-Fi devices (IEEE 802.11a / n / ac / ax), NTC applies indoor-use restrictions to certain sub-bands: devices operating in the UNII-2 (5.25–5.35 GHz) and UNII-2 Extended (5.47–5.725 GHz) bands — which overlap with radar and weather satellite allocations — are restricted to indoor use and require Dynamic Frequency Selection (DFS) and Transmit Power Control (TPC) compliance under NTC spectrum rules. The 2.4 GHz (UNII-1 / 2.4–2.4835 GHz) band is generally unrestricted for indoor and outdoor use at NTC-permitted power levels. NTC type approval testing covers radio spectrum compliance including DFS verification for 5 GHz devices. Devices not implementing DFS/TPC on restricted 5 GHz sub-bands will not obtain NTC type approval.
summary.zh: 国家电信委员会（NTC）负责管理菲律宾的无线电频谱分配，并为在授权和非授权频段运行的设备制定技术要求。设备须符合NTC通过NTC备忘通告实施的频率分配计划和功率限制。对于5 GHz Wi-Fi设备（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax），NTC对特定子频段实施室内使用限制：在UNII-2（5.25–5.35 GHz）和UNII-2扩展（5.47–5.725 GHz）频段——与雷达和气象卫星分配频段重叠——运行的设备依据NTC频谱规则须限于室内使用，并须符合动态频率选择（DFS）和发射功率控制（TPC）合规要求。2.4 GHz（UNII-1 / 2.4–2.4835 GHz）频段在NTC许可功率限制下通常不限制室内和室外使用。NTC型号认证测试涵盖无线电频谱合规，包括5 GHz设备的DFS验证。在受限5 GHz子频段上未实施DFS/TPC的设备将无法取得NTC型号认证。
summary.zht: 國家電信委員會（NTC）負責管理菲律賓的無線電頻譜分配，並為在授權和非授權頻段運行的設備制定技術要求。設備須符合NTC通過NTC備忘通告實施的頻率分配計劃和功率限制。對於5 GHz Wi-Fi設備（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax），NTC對特定子頻段實施室內使用限制：在UNII-2（5.25–5.35 GHz）和UNII-2擴展（5.47–5.725 GHz）頻段——與雷達和氣象衛星分配頻段重疊——運行的設備依據NTC頻譜規則須限於室內使用，並須符合動態頻率選擇（DFS）和發射功率控制（TPC）合規要求。2.4 GHz（UNII-1 / 2.4–2.4835 GHz）頻段在NTC許可功率限制下通常不限制室內和室外使用。NTC型號認證測試涵蓋無線電頻譜合規，包括5 GHz設備的DFS驗證。在受限5 GHz子頻段上未實施DFS/TPC的設備將無法取得NTC型號認證。

standards_or_laws: NTC Memorandum Circular — Philippine Frequency Allocation Plan (radio spectrum allocation for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz unlicensed bands)
NTC technical requirements for 5 GHz Wi-Fi devices — DFS and TPC mandatory for UNII-2 / UNII-2 Extended sub-bands (5.25–5.35 GHz and 5.47–5.725 GHz)
ITU Radio Regulations — Annex 5 / Philippine frequency allocation aligned with ITU Region 3 plan
Republic Act No. 7925 — NTC spectrum management authority under the Public Telecommunications Policy Act
NTC Type Approval testing scope — radio spectrum compliance, power output, and DFS/TPC verification included

summary.en: In China, radio spectrum compliance for unlicensed devices is governed by MIIT through SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval. SRRC covers 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz band devices under MIIT radio frequency regulations. China's 5 GHz SRRC rules also require DFS for UNII-2 and UNII-2 Extended sub-bands, generally aligned with ITU Region 3 practices. However, Chinese SRRC type approval certificates and radio performance test reports are issued against China-specific MIIT regulations and are not recognised by Philippine NTC. A Philippine NTC type approval covering 5 GHz DFS compliance must be obtained separately.
summary.zh: 在中国，非授权设备的无线电频谱合规由MIIT通过SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准进行管理。SRRC涵盖MIIT无线电频率法规下的2.4 GHz和5 GHz频段设备。中国5 GHz SRRC规则对UNII-2和UNII-2扩展子频段同样要求DFS，与ITU第三区实践基本一致。但中国SRRC型号核准证书和无线电性能测试报告依据中国特定MIIT法规颁发，不被菲律宾NTC承认。须单独取得涵盖5 GHz DFS合规的菲律宾NTC型号认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，非授權設備的無線電頻譜合規由MIIT通過SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准進行管理。SRRC涵蓋MIIT無線電頻率法規下的2.4 GHz和5 GHz頻段設備。中國5 GHz SRRC規則對UNII-2和UNII-2擴展子頻段同樣要求DFS，與ITU第三區實踐基本一致。但中國SRRC型號核准證書和無線電性能測試報告依據中國特定MIIT法規頒發，不被菲律賓NTC承認。須單獨取得涵蓋5 GHz DFS合規的菲律賓NTC型號認證。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval — MIIT spectrum compliance for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz unlicensed devices
MIIT regulations on use of unlicensed short-range radio frequency bands — 2.4 GHz (2400–2483.5 MHz) and 5 GHz (5725–5850 MHz unlicensed; UNII-2/UNII-2E DFS required)
GB/T 30594 — Chinese short-range device (SRD) radio technical requirements

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval covers Chinese radio spectrum requirements and is not recognised by Philippine NTC. A separate NTC type approval covering Philippine frequency allocation compliance — including mandatory DFS and TPC for 5 GHz UNII-2 / UNII-2 Extended sub-bands — must be obtained. Exporters of dual-band Wi-Fi devices must verify that their 5 GHz implementation includes DFS/TPC for the Philippine NTC type approval test. Devices that operate in the 5.25–5.725 GHz range without DFS/TPC will fail NTC type approval testing. The 5.725–5.85 GHz UNII-3 band may have different power and use conditions under NTC rules — verify the applicable NTC MC for current limits.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC型号核准涵盖中国无线电频谱要求，不被菲律宾NTC承认。须单独取得涵盖菲律宾频率分配合规的NTC型号认证——包括5 GHz UNII-2 / UNII-2扩展子频段的强制DFS和TPC。双频Wi-Fi设备出口商须核验其5 GHz实施方案在菲律宾NTC型号认证测试中包含DFS/TPC。在5.25–5.725 GHz范围内运行且不具备DFS/TPC的设备将无法通过NTC型号认证测试。5.725–5.85 GHz UNII-3频段在NTC规则下可能有不同的功率和使用条件——请核验适用NTC备忘通告的当前限值。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC型號核准涵蓋中國無線電頻譜要求，不被菲律賓NTC承認。須單獨取得涵蓋菲律賓頻率分配合規的NTC型號認證——包括5 GHz UNII-2 / UNII-2擴展子頻段的強制DFS和TPC。雙頻Wi-Fi設備出口商須核驗其5 GHz實施方案在菲律賓NTC型號認證測試中包含DFS/TPC。在5.25–5.725 GHz範圍內運行且不具備DFS/TPC的設備將無法通過NTC型號認證測試。5.725–5.85 GHz UNII-3頻段在NTC規則下可能有不同的功率和使用條件——請核驗適用NTC備忘通告的當前限值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NTC radio spectrum compliance required for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT devices operating in Philippine allocated frequency bands; DFS and TPC mandatory for 5 GHz UNII-2 / UNII-2 Extended sub-bands (5.25–5.35 GHz and 5.47–5.725 GHz); covered within NTC type approval process
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all radio-frequency devices including 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz unlicensed bands; DFS required for 5 GHz UNII-2 / UNII-2E sub-bands under MIIT rules; Chinese SRRC not recognised by Philippine NTC

source.publisher: National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) — Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Philippine NTC radio spectrum compliance — including DFS and TPC for 5 GHz UNII-2 / UNII-2 Extended sub-bands — is mandatory and is assessed as part of the NTC type approval process. Chinese SRRC documentation is not recognised by NTC. Dual-band Wi-Fi device exporters must verify 5 GHz DFS/TPC implementation before submitting for NTC type approval testing. Devices operating in restricted 5 GHz sub-bands without DFS/TPC will fail NTC type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾NTC无线电频谱合规——包括5 GHz UNII-2 / UNII-2扩展子频段的DFS和TPC——具有强制约束力，作为NTC型号认证过程的一部分进行评估。中国SRRC文件不被NTC承认。双频Wi-Fi设备出口商须在提交NTC型号认证测试前核验5 GHz DFS/TPC实施方案。在受限5 GHz子频段上运行且不具备DFS/TPC的设备将无法通过NTC型号认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓NTC無線電頻譜合規——包括5 GHz UNII-2 / UNII-2擴展子頻段的DFS和TPC——具有強制約束力，作為NTC型號認證過程的一部分進行評估。中國SRRC文件不被NTC承認。雙頻Wi-Fi設備出口商須在提交NTC型號認證測試前核驗5 GHz DFS/TPC實施方案。在受限5 GHz子頻段上運行且不具備DFS/TPC的設備將無法通過NTC型號認證。
